properties.displayName: Encryption in transit should be required for Azure Files SMB and NFS protocols
properties.description: Azure Files can enforce encryption in transit for SMB and NFS protocols so that clients connect only over encrypted channels. Requiring encryption in transit protects data exchanged with file shares from network-layer attacks such as man-in-the-middle, eavesdropping, and session hijacking, and helps meet regulatory and organizational data-protection requirements.

metadata.description: The effect determines what happens when the policy rule is evaluated to match
